assertions.assertion: The login page checks context.IdP from GetAuthorizationContextAsync and bypasses the login UI when an IdP hint is present
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states: 'Your login page checks context.IdP from GetAuthorizationContextAsync and can skip the login UI entirely, redirecting straight to the external provider.'

assertions.assertion: The login page performs email-domain-based routing, sending @contoso.com users to the AAD provider
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md lists 'Email/identifier-based: Ask for email, infer provider from domain' as an HRD strategy for 'SaaS with corporate federation'.

assertions.assertion: The spa.app client is configured with IdentityProviderRestrictions that includes 'Google' and excludes 'AAD'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `IdentityProviderRestrictions = { "AAD", "local" }` pattern for restricting providers per client.

assertions.assertion: The login page issues a Challenge to the appropriate external provider scheme when HRD determines the provider
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `return Challenge("AAD", props);` for triggering external authentication.
